title: luzula campestris var. minor
intro: Luzula campestris var. minor, also known as the field woodrush or small field woodrush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Juncaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of saponins and other compounds. The health benefits associated with Luzula campestris var. minor include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other ailments.
